title: Mock Test 54 - Subjunctive Mood
description: Subjunctive Mood নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Wish, If only, As if/though, Suggest/Recommend/Insist that + V1, It's time + V2, Would rather that + V2 ইত্যাদি।

questions.question: Subjunctive Mood কী বোঝায়?
'I wish I ___ a bird.' — সঠিক verb?
'She acts as if she ___ the boss.' — সঠিক?
'I suggest that he ___ a doctor.' — সঠিক?
'It's time you ___ to bed.' — সঠিক?
'I would rather you ___ here.' — সঠিক?
questions.explanation: 'Would rather + subject + V2 — different subject subjunctive।

questions.question: I wish I ___ harder for the exam.
If only I ___ more time!
questions.explanation: 'If only' + Past (had) — present wish বা Past Perfect — past wish।

questions.question: He talks as if he ___ everything.
The doctor recommended that she ___ more water.
Error: 'I wish I am a bird.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Wish' → were (subjunctive)। 'I wish I were a bird.'

questions.question: Error: 'She insisted that he goes with her.' — ভুল?
Error: 'It's time we leave now.' — ভুল?
Error: 'He behaves as if he is rich.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'As if' → were (subjunctive)। 'as if he were rich'।

questions.question: Fill: 'I suggest that the meeting ___ (be) postponed.'
questions.explanation: 'Suggest that + V1 (base)' → 'that the meeting be postponed'।

questions.question: Fill: 'If only I ___ (listen) to my mother!'
questions.explanation: 'If only + Past Perfect' — past regret। 'If only I had listened'।

questions.question: Fill: 'It's high time you ___ (start) preparing.'
Fill: 'He wishes he ___ (can) fly.'
অনুবাদ: 'আমি যদি আরও সময় পেতাম!'
options: I wish I have more time.
I wish I had more time.
I wish I will have time.
I wish I am having time.

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'সে পরামর্শ দিল যে সে ডাক্তার দেখুক।'
options: He suggested that she sees a doctor.
He suggested that she see a doctor.
He suggested that she saw a doctor.
He suggested that she will see a doctor.
